own_review_points: docker_db.sh: 'if [[ $DB_COUNT > 8 ]]' uses lexicographic string comparison inside [[ ]], not numeric (-gt) — latent bug in instance-count clamping
docker_db.sh: sequential ports 9010+n / 9020+n can collide with other CI DB services; no range reservation
docker_db.sh: instance/db creation via curl swallows non-2xx responses, so misconfigured emulators proceed silently
(the vast majority of core dialect/function/type changes are past the 7000-char truncation and cannot be verified)
notes: 193-file PR truncated to the docker_db.sh multi-emulator refactor; only v8's port-allocation point falls inside the visible window and is reasonable (good). The CommunityDatabase alphabetical-ordering point is a pure style nit (trivial). Seven points cite lines past the truncation (unverifiable, not penalized). v8 missed the genuine '[[ $DB_COUNT > 8 ]]' string-vs-numeric comparison bug that is plainly visible in the diff. Human reference is empty of technical content.
